abilities.name: Battle Aura
abilities.text: As long as Feraligatr is in play, each of your Pokemon that has δ on its card does 10 more damage to the Defending Pokemon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

tests.name: battle_aura_bonus
tests.description: Test that Battle Aura gives +10 to delta Pokemon attacks

tests.name: battle_aura_requires_delta_attacker
tests.description: Test that Battle Aura only applies to delta Pokemon
